description: This project demonstrates building open-source Node-RED custom nodes and a FlowFuse Dashboard styled after TESAIoT Admin UI to interact with the TESAIoT platform via APISIX API Gateway.
quick_start_steps: Step 1 — Clone the repository and navigate to the project folder.
Step 2 — Copy .env.example to .env and fill in your TESAIoT API key and other environment variables.
Step 3 — Run the bootstrap script (run.sh) to install dependencies and build the TypeScript custom nodes.
Step 4 — Start the Node-RED instance using Docker Compose (docker-compose up) and access the dashboard at http://localhost:1880/admin.
